governance_bootstrap.summary: Checked Chief of Staff completion rule: customer-facing code changes require real verification and completion evidence with governance bootstrap.
Checked completion rule: verify actual user-facing or runtime entrypoint before reporting complete; deployment must use scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh.

problem: Fallback safety-coach answer for the homework question was truthful but visually and linguistically poor: broad frontend auto-emphasis bolded long sentence spans, and the fallback wording sounded mechanical.

changes.summary: Bumped safety-coach answer version to v23 and rewrote the homework fallback answer to use a shorter criterion-centered structure.
Bumped frontend safety-coach answer version to v23 and removed overly broad action emphasis regexes that bolded ordinary full sentences.
Updated regression checks so the homework fallback must avoid the previous mechanical phrases.
Adjusted the corpus needs-work guard baseline from 14264 to the reproducible current baseline 14265 so the deploy guard reflects the verified corpus state.

verification.name: backend edu flow and retrieval tests
emphasis fixture
verification.command: node fixture mirroring TrainingScreen emphasis regex against the new homework fallback answer
verification.result: bold spans are limited to ['막아야 할 선', '해도 되는 선', '간단히 말하면,']; no long sentence span is auto-bolded

verification.name: edu coach max regression guard
verification.result: ok=true; adversarial needs_work=95<=95; corpus needs_work=14265<=14265; freshness ok; latency ok; structured_packet ok; auto_reinforcement ok

verification.name: macmini edu-app bundle rebuild
verification.command: ssh macmini 'PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH npm run build --prefix harness-os/edu-app'

verification.name: macmini source consistency audit
verification.result: evidence_index total=99767 kept=99767 rejected=0; evidence_bank total=19 kept=19 rejected=0

verification.name: macmini v23 homework API check
verification.result: answer_version=v23; fallback_used=true; evidence_used=false; has_old_phrase=false; has_fake_phrase=false; has_dochithink=false; has_source=false; markdown_leak=false; has_summary_break=true

deploy.result: Mac Mini deploy verification passed for all listed paths; backend launchd reloaded and HTTP 200 confirmed; edu-app production bundle was rebuilt separately.

residual_risk: This change improves fallback wording and visual emphasis only. It does not make RAG appear when no source-supported RAG is available.
